gray_areas_identified.plan_choice: Per-predicate deserializeMode enum (SourceWins | IfAbsent | Skip), default SourceWins for backcompat
alternatives: Top-level `seed:` section only runs on first deploy
Hash-based idempotence — preserve customer edits by comparing target hash to last-known source hash
gray_areas_identified.open_question: Default should likely flip to IfAbsent for Content predicates — memory says no backcompat needed (beta, 0.x)

gray_areas_identified.plan_choice: 37-02 puts ShopIndexRepository/ShopIndexName in RuntimeColumnsRegistry; 37-03 puts same columns in CredentialColumnsRegistry
gray_areas_identified.open_question: Needs single source of truth before 37-02 and 37-03 are both implemented

gray_areas_identified.plan_choice: Atomic dir swap: SerializeRoot.new → SerializeRoot (Windows fallback: .old rename + delete)
alternatives: Files-written manifest + post-swap delete of non-manifest files (preserves unrelated files if SerializeRoot is shared)
gray_areas_identified.open_question: Is SerializeRoot ever shared with non-serializer artifacts? If yes, manifest approach is safer.

gray_areas_identified.plan_choice: Bundle 5 subsystems in one plan: DwCacheServiceRegistry + TemplateAssetManifest + StrictMode + LINK-02 SqlTable link resolution + BaselineDiffWriter
alternatives: Split BaselineDiff into its own plan (P2 per FINDINGS)
gray_areas_identified.open_question: Does plan size hurt execution atomicity?

alternatives: Default strict for API/CLI entry points (CI/CD is the target)
gray_areas_identified.open_question: If v0.5.0 goal is 'safe for Azure pipelines', should strict be default for API path?

gray_areas_identified.plan_choice: Manifest + validation only — templates are NOT serialized
alternatives: Scope creep: add Templates predicate that serializes cshtml/json files (F-15 long-term)
gray_areas_identified.open_question: Confirm scope cap — templates ship via code deploy, not baseline?

gray_areas_identified.plan_choice: Extend InternalLinkResolver to SqlTable string columns (LINK-02)
alternatives: Pre-commit validation sweep (catch unresolved links at baseline creation)
gray_areas_identified.open_question: Performance impact of scanning every varchar on MERGE/INSERT?
